title: [policy] TOFU key management compliance
description: Policy: spec/06-security.md §8.6. REQUIRED: Trust On First Use. First contact with peer stores their pubkey. Subsequent contacts verify against stored key. Key rotation requires explicit user action. When executing: grep for peer key storage/verification, create compliance bead per code section.
close_reason: All TOFU violations fixed: 5/5 children complete. Added key pinning checks in lichen_l2.c, app_identity.c, and address.py. First contact pins pubkey; subsequent contacts with different key are rejected with -EEXIST (C) or ValueError (Python).
